ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the line item */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant of the product in the line item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the line item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the line item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the line item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "price_adjustment" REAL /* Price adjustment for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, warehouse staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics" (
  "logistics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logistics entry */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the logistics belongs to */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logistics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logistics_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the reward */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered by the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer in the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollments_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
